value_metric_s1: single-source-of-truth schema base for sources: authority enum (China A0/A1/A2 only for official; media/search/aggregator can never be official_evidence), source identity uniqueness, enable/health/cursor fields; machine-enforced, groundwork for DRIFT-FACT-006 resolution

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: one registry row per new source, must pass validate_source_registry

acceptance_tests: valid sample VALID; china_official A3 INVALID; china_official missing level INVALID; media official_evidence=true INVALID; duplicate source_id INVALID
